Dear Sangha Maitreyas,                                                                                                     
Warm greetings!
 
It gives us great pleasure to extend a warm welcome to you as a part of the âNewton Sangha Maitreyasâ Community.
 
 LIFE RESEARCH ACADEMY Presents
 âA 2 day Workshop on âSACRED BREATHâ for the very first time in âThe City Of Joyâ by the internationally acclaimed Past Life Regression therapists & New Age Spiritual Masters Dr. Newton Kondaveti, M.D.& Dr. Lakshmi M.B.B.S. on Saturday the 26th of September & Sunday the 27th of September 2015.
Breath is sacred. It animates our body, it gives force and power to our words, chants and songs, and it enables us to purify ourselves and ou r cells. It is powerful. It gives meaning and language, it can carry great wisdom (or foolishness) and it can store power or send it outwards. 
It is your birth right to be walking breathing living light on this earth. This journey with sacred breath will assist with your emotional body, your soul body, and your physical body to complete in this process of becoming one again with your Spirit while still in your physical.
 "A crucial tool for health and happinessâ¦your sacred breath".
Principle
Breath connects to birth trauma. To connect to the birth trauma, we need to become aware of the energy impressions carried by our breath. This can be done either through the practice of Meditation combined with breath awareness, or intuitive energy breathing practices. Intuitive energy breathing practices are amongst the most simple and most effective ways to not only relive the birth trauma but also to release it.
Objectives
This Workshop is a certified course designed to help you in the following ways:
â¢	It helps you to clear the energy blocks affecting your physical, emotional, and mental well-being.
â¢	It helps you in your quest for Inner Transformation and Spiritual Growth.
â¢	It helps you in understanding the art and science of breathing.
Syllabus
â¢	Be introduced to the power of the breath
â¢	Experience sacredness of breath
â¢	Learn how to correct restrictive breathing patterns
â¢	Learn techniques for increasing your energy level and sense of well-being
â¢	Gain tools to manage stress and actively participate in your own healing
â¢	'The Language of Breath' 
â¢	'The relationship of Breath with Emotionsâ 
'The Essence of Breath' 
           Learn to release Birth Trauma/Birthing Patterns through sacred breath
 Methodology 
Is a very EMPOWERING and WISDOM based workshop arranged to answer many of your questions and the practical sessions were designed to bring about a transformation in your life. 
A wide range of audio-video multimedia presentations on related topics with interactive practical sessions would be presented during this training program to give you the best possible information and enrich your overall experience of healing.
For more detailed information on this workshop you may visit our Event Section on Facebook to constantly keep you updated at https://www.facebook.com/events/440665162 or browse through our website www.liferesearchacademy.com and run through the topic in the Workshop Section.
Venue Details:
The Park Hotel
17, Park Street
Kolkata-700017

Pre-requisites for joining the workshop:
 
You need to fill in a registration form and send it along with the participation fee, for completing all your registration formalities.
 
Workshop Timings: 

All participants must reach the venue at 8.45 am sharp in the morning and the workshop will end at 6.00 pm in the evening on both the days.
 
Refreshments: 

Morning and Afternoon Tea/Biscuits with a Vegetarian lunch will be served on both the days (all inclusive)
 
Workshop material:
 
The workshop folder/material will be provided to all the participants at the venue.
 
Things to wear/carry:
 
Wear loose comfortable clothing. 
Kindly carry a light woollen shawl with you.

Venue parking details :
 
Parking is available throughout the day for the workshop participants.
 
Early bird offer/ Registrations :

Do register by the 1st of September 2015 to avail an early bird offer for INR 9000/ participant or INR 9500/ participant for all registrations received thereafter.  Last date for completing all the registration formalities is the 23rd of September 2015 after which no registrations will be entertained.
 
Eligibility for Workshop Participation :
 
This very intensive experiential workshop on self-awakening and self-discovery is very useful for:
 
Individuals, Trainers, Teachers, Healers, Psychoanalysts, Doctors, Counsellors, Clinical Psychologists and Psychiatrists who wish to enhance their Spiritual skills. 
 
NO visitors/friends/family/well-wishers is allowed to enter the banquet hall during certification without prior permission.
 
Hereâs wishing you a very successful journey of self-discovery and a most effective detangling of all your unhealed issues under the gentle & watchful guidance of the âZen Mettasâ.

Dr.Newton has conceptualised a Live Full Moon Musical Meditation Event with Self-healing Ragas flowing from the Sarod in the Evening on Monday- 28th of Sept 2015 between 6.00 pm to 8.30 pm, at Birla Sabhaghar. Queens Park Road, Ballygunge, hence we request your active participation in the same .You are free to bring your family and friends to the event as all like-minded people are welcome.
 
Waiting to hear from you soon.
 
Geeti Bhojnagarwala
+91 9830226429
 
Sunita Kedia
+91 9830139956
Regional Coordinators for LRA 
 
Dr. K. Newton, M.D. 
www.luglobal.org 
www.cluglobal.org
www.arrrglobal.org
www.angelsofearth.org
www.liferesearchacademy.com
